news.summary: Novo Nordisk A/S (NYSE: NVO) reported the discovery of several hundred units of counterfeit Ozempic (semaglutide) injection 1 mg circulating in the U.S. These unauthorized products bear the lot number PAR0362 and fake serial numbers starting with 51746517. Although lot number PAR0362 is genuine, it is deemed fake when accompanied by the first eight digits 51746517. Consumers are cautioned against the use of these counterfeit products.
news.headline: Counterfeit Ozempic found in US supply chain with fake labels and needles, FDA alerts. Several hundred units distributed, featuring lot number PAR0362 and illegitimate serial numbers starting with 51746517. Novo Nordisk alerted, authentic lot number PAR0362.

news.summary: On April 11, attorneys Jonathan Baughman and William Grubb from McGinnis Lochridge achieved a significant win as they secured a $5.9 million jury verdict for their client and a co-plaintiff in a complex fiduciary duty and fraud lawsuit. The successful outcome was reached in Harris County, reflecting the expertise and dedication of the legal team.
news.headline: McGinnis Lochridge lawyers secure $5.9M verdict in fiduciary duty case in Houston. Resounding victory on April 11.

news.summary: A strategic partnership has been revealed between Dendi, a prominent cloud-native laboratory information system (LIS) provider based in Overland Park, Kansas, and Molecular Lab Partners (MLP), a specialized consultancy focusing on high-complexity lab processes. This partnership, announced on April 15, 2025, marks an important collaboration in the healthcare industry. Dendi's expertise in cloud-native LIS will combine with MLP's efficiency in high-complexity lab services to enhance operational processes. This collaboration aims to streamline lab operations and improve overall efficiency, benefiting from the respective strengths of each organization. The partnership is seen as a significant move that will potentially impact the industry, offering enhanced solutions to meet the growing demands in high-complexity laboratory settings. Stay tuned for further developments resulting from this exciting collaboration.
news.headline: Dendi and MLP partner to empower labs nationwide with cloud LIS. Efforts set to enhance efficiency.

news.summary: The unpredictable implementation of tariffs by the Trump administration has caused instability in the markets. Despite this, the primary U.S. stock indexes showed a level of stability compared to recent fluctuations.
news.headline: S&P 500 & Nasdaq see slight gains amidst Trump's tariff uncertainty, showing relative calm amid market volatility.

news.summary: LanzaTech Global, Inc. reported total revenue of $12.0 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, a decrease from $20.5 million in the same period in 2023. The full-year revenue for 2024 was $49.6 million compared to $62.6 million in 2023. The company is focusing on global deployment of its technology, evaluating liquidity enhancing initiatives, and cost reduction plans due to doubts about its ability to continue as a going concern as per GAAP. The net loss for 2024 was $137.7 million, and adjusted EBITDA loss was $88.2 million. LanzaTech had $58.1 million in total cash, restricted cash, and investments as of December 31, 2024. The company aims to transform waste carbon into sustainable fuels, chemicals, materials, and protein.
news.headline: LanzaTech saw decrease in revenue for Q4 2024 at $12.0M vs $20.5M in Q4 2023, with full-year revenue at $49.6M vs $62.6M in 2023. Losses increased in both periods, with net loss at $27.0M in Q4 2024. Assessing liquidity initiatives, facing doubts on future operations. Operating expenses increased, with net loss at $137.7M for full-year 2024. Company has $58.1M in total cash at end of 2024. non-GAAP financial measures used. Visit website for more details.

news.summary: In Warren, Michigan on April 15, 2025, it was announced that Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. was recognized as the 2024 Supplier of the Year by General Motors (GM). news.summary: Securitize Fund Services has recently taken over the fund administration business of MG Stover, resulting in the management of more than $38 billion in assets spread across 715 funds. news.headline: Securitize acquires MG Stover's Fund Administration business, now largest digital asset fund admin with $38B assets, 715 funds.

news.headline: Bank First reports net income of $18.2 million with earnings per share at $1.82 for Q1 2025, a 20.53% increase from last year.

news.summary: Cutting-edge GaNSafe ICs are revolutionizing the electric vehicle (EV) industry by delivering unmatched power density and efficiency in on-board chargers (OBCs) and high voltage-low voltage (HV-LV) DC-DC converters. These high-power GaNSafe ICs are setting new standards in the field, offering a production-ready solution for EV manufacturers to enhance their vehicles' performance. The technology is expected to significantly improve the power capabilities of EVs, ultimately contributing to the advancement of sustainable transportation.
news.headline: Navitas has announced the automotive qualification of high-power GaNSafe ICs for EVs, offering increased power density and efficiency for on-board chargers and DC-DC converters.

news.summary: Based in Irvine, California, 1031 Crowdfunding is a prominent real estate crowdfunding platform specializing in 1031 exchanges and investment opportunities centered on tax deferral. They recently highlighted the positive effects of an investment made via their 1031CF Bridge Fund III program. Partnering with Cima Investment Group, they acquired the Dorset Place Community in Oklahoma City. This housing complex is being converted from an assisted living facility into a secure environment for homeless veterans. The initiative aims to provide these veterans with a safe and supportive place to live.
news.headline: 1031 Crowdfunding aids Dorset Place's transformation for veterans; in partnership with Cima Investment Group.

(Nasdaq: DIBS), a prominent platform for unique design items, is set to announce its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Friday, May 9, 2025, in a press release before the market opens. Interested parties can find the press release on the 1stDibs Investor Relations website (investors.1stdibs.com). news.summary: Milestone Scientific Inc. has expanded its CompuFlo Epidural System adoption across various pain management clinics and ambulatory surgery centers after Medicare price assignment in multiple U.S. states. The company reported $8.6 million in revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024, compared to $9.8 million in 2023. Despite a decrease in revenue, the company saw growth in e-commerce sales, with U.S. e-commerce revenue reaching approximately $5.1 million in 2024. International revenue declined to approximately $3.4 million in 2024. Operating loss reduced to $6.8 million in 2024 from $7.1 million in 2023, while net loss was approximately $4.7 million in 2024. Milestone Scientific has focused on streamlining operations and expanding its market reach through partnerships and federal contracts. The company remains optimistic about its growth potential in both dental and medical segments.
news.headline: Milestone Scientific reports $8.6M revenue for 2024, plans to expand CompuFlo Epidural System; 95M injections given with STA System.

news.headline: Info-Tech Research Group to host IGNITE 2025 event in Detroit on May 7, connecting IT leaders with experts at Westin Book Cadillac Detroit.

news.summary: Following the Medicare price assignment in multiple states, the CompuFlo® Epidural System is now being implemented in more pain management clinics and ambulatory surgery centers across the US. This expansion has led to a significant increase in the availability of the system, with a growing number of facilities adopting it for their procedures. This move is in response to the positive reception and demand for the system, indicating its effectiveness and value in the healthcare industry.
news.headline: Milestone Scientific reports 2024 financial results, sees positive outlook for 2025 with CompuFlo® Epidural System expansion.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Diginex Limited revealed a partnership with AIKYA, an AI & big data technology firm boasting roughly 2.5 million users. This collaboration will introduce diginexESG, Diginex's acclaimed ESG reporting platform, in Malaysia. The agreement, inked on March 18, 2025, involved an upfront license fee tranche paid to Diginex today. The primary objective of this strategic alliance is to enable Malaysian enterprises to bolster ESG transparency, simplify adherence to regulations, and boost sustainable finance efforts, aligned with Malaysia's sustainability targets.
news.headline: Diginex Limited partners with AIKYA to launch diginexESG in Malaysia, targeting 2.5 million users; seeks to boost ESG reporting and sustainable finance.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Cardiff Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRDF) based in San Diego disclosed the granting of non-qualified stock options to acquire 35,040 shares of its common stock to a new employee. These stock options were given as part of the inducement for the new employee to join the company, in line with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Cardiff Oncology focuses on leveraging PLK1 inhibition to create innovative therapies for various cancers and operates as a clinical-stage biotechnology company.
news.headline: Cardiff Oncology granted an inducement of 35,040 stock options to new employee under Nasdaq rule.
